name: Vitamin C Glow Face Wash
short: A brightening Vitamin C face wash with black turmeric, lemon extract, and niacinamide for an even, radiant tone.
description: Vitamin C Glow is a brightening daily face wash that pairs Vitamin C with black turmeric (kaempferia galanga) — an Ayurvedic botanical long valued for its clarifying properties. Lemon extract boosts radiance, while niacinamide helps even tone and fade the look of dark spots over time. The sulfate-free, paraben-free formula is gentle enough for daily use on all skin types. Skin looks brighter, fresher, and more luminous with every cleanse.
benefits: Brightens with Vitamin C and lemon extract
Black turmeric clarifies — an Ayurvedic-inspired ingredient
Niacinamide helps even tone and fade dark spots
usage: Massage a pea-sized amount onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. For best results, follow with a Vitamin C serum and SPF during the day.

customerReviews.title: Gives results
customerReviews.body: Works wonders. You can see results in few days. Skin gets even tone. Go for it.

customerReviews.title: Loving it!! 15 days of using it...
customerReviews.body: Absolutely loving this face wash! It cleans my skin thoroughly without leaving it dry or stretched. The formula feels super gentle, foams up well, and leaves my skin feeling fresh, soft, and refreshed after every use.

customerReviews.title: Nice Product
customerReviews.body: APS Majeste Vitamin C Glow Face Wash is a refreshing and gentle cleanser that leaves the skin feeling clean, soft, and bright after every wash. The Vitamin C formula helps give a natural glow to the face while removing dirt, excess oil, and daily impurities effectively. It has a pleasant fragrance and creates a rich lather without making the skin feel dry or tight.

customerReviews.title: Vitamin c face wash
customerReviews.body: Really happy with this face wash! It cleanses well without making my skin feel dry or tight. The texture is gentle, it lathers nicely, and leaves my skin feeling fresh and soft after every wash. I’ve noticed my skin looks clearer and feels smoother with regular use. Also love that it feels mild on the skin and works well for daily use. Definitely worth trying!
